title: Problem
content: 38% of online shoppers cite packaging waste as a reason to avoid frequent orders. Brands face rising ESG pressure but have no easy reusable packaging option.

title: Solution
content: Loopit provides returnable, trackable packaging-as-a-service. Brands ship in Loopit boxes; customers drop them at any partner locker.

title: Product
content: QR-tagged boxes, partner locker network, brand dashboard for reuse analytics.

title: Traction
content: 3 pilot brands, 14,000 boxes in circulation, 91% return rate.

title: Go-to-Market
content: Direct sales to DTC sustainability-focused brands, starting in 3 cities.

title: Team
content: Ex-Amazon ops lead, ex-Patagonia supply chain manager.

title: Ask
content: Raising $1.5M seed to expand to 10 cities and triple the locker network.
